coverage_note: The bundled KCNJ11 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from KCNJ11 ATP-sensitive potassium channel gating, beta-cell insulin secretion, neonatal diabetes biology, and sulfonylurea pharmacology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000187486: KCNJ11 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: KCNJ11 findings should be read against ATP-sensitive potassium channel gating, beta-cell insulin secretion, neonatal diabetes biology, and sulfonylurea pharmacology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs5219 (KCNJ11 E23K) is curated as a KCNJ11 marker for Neonatal diabetes review context, Type 2 diabetes association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

KCNJ11 neonatal-diabetes model is curated as a KCNJ11 marker for Neonatal diabetes review context, Type 2 diabetes association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
